items.title: AI firm Anthropic sues Trump admin over ‘supply chain risk’ label
items.summary: Anthropic is the first US company the Pentagon has labeled a risk to the military, with the AI company calling it “unprecedented and unlawful.”

items.title: Chainalysis Upgrades Support for Stellar with Automatic Token Support
items.summary: Chainalysis is excited to announce upgraded support for Stellar, one of the longest-running blockchains in the ecosystem. Founded in 2014,… The post Chainalysis Upgrades Support for Stellar with Automatic Token Support appeared first on Chainalysis.

items.title: Ether, solana, XRP jump higher as Trump signals Iran war nearing end
items.summary: Major altcoins bounced alongside risk assets on Tuesday after the president said U.S. military objectives were "pretty well complete."

items.title: Bitcoin rises to $69,000, stocks reverse big early losses, as crude oil sinks back below $100
items.summary: WTI crude oil, which soared nearly 30% to $120 per barrel overnight, has pulled back to $95, easing pressure on risk assets.

items.title: Bithumb faces possible six-month partial suspension in South Korea
items.summary: Crypto exchange Bithumb risks a partial business suspension for negligence around money laundering and customer verification practices, according to local media reports.

items.title: Bitcoiners celebrate as the network produces its 20 millionth coin
items.summary: “A digital money system with transparent, predictable, and ultimately scarce supply... has rising appeal in today’s economy due to fiat currency tail risks," said Grayscale.

items.title: Bitmine moves roughly 9,600 ETH worth $19.5 million to Coinbase Prime as ether treasury firm shuffles holdings
items.summary: The largest public ether holder sent two transfers totaling $19.5 million to Coinbase Prime hot wallets on Tuesday, though the moves don't necessarily signal selling.

items.title: Pudgy Penguins launches its 'Club Penguin' moment, and the game doesn't feel like crypto at all
items.summary: Pudgy World went live with 12 towns, plot-based quests, and mini-games in what the team calls "one of the most technically advanced browser-based games ever created." The PENGU token jumped 9% on the news.

items.title: Here's how traders and big buyers stepped in to keep bitcoin steady during the oil shock
items.summary: Several market participants, including MSTR and OTC traders, kept demand steady, helping BTC stay resilient.

items.title: AI tokens rally after Nvidia open-source agent plan, beat CoinDesk 20
items.summary: The AI-linked cryptocurrencies moved higher after a report from Wired said Nvidia is planning an open-source platform for autonomous AI agents.

items.title: Bhutan sells $42.5 Million of bitcoin in 2026 as national stack drops 58% from peak
items.summary: The Himalayan kingdom moved another 175 BTC on Monday, continuing a drawdown that has taken its holdings from a peak of roughly 13,000 BTC to under 5,400 in just over a year.

items.title: Bitcoin jumps past $70,000 as war volatility fades
items.summary: BTC rebounded from about $65,000 as crude oil retreated and institutional flows helped stabilize the market.

items.title: Trump's threat to block Congress over voter-ID law leaves crypto bill on shakier ground
items.summary: At a Republican event, the U.S. president delivered a speech that doubled down on recent comments he won't sign anything else until he gets the voting bill.

items.title: Tron joins Agentic AI Foundation as founder sees future in AI
items.summary: Tron has joined the Linux Foundation’s Agentic AI Foundation to collaborate on building open infrastructure for agentic AI, joining Circle and JPMorgan.

items.title: Bhutan moves $11.8M in BTC from its national stash: Arkham
items.summary: Bhutan has accumulated around 13,000 Bitcoin since launching state-backed mining operations in 2019, primarily fueled by hydroelectric energy.

items.title: Vitalik Buterin envisions ‘one-click’ Ether staking for institutions
items.summary: “We want the authority over staking nodes to be highly distributed, and the first step to doing this is to make it easy,” said Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin.

items.title: US prosecutors seek Roman Storm retrial after mixed verdict
items.summary: Manhattan US Attorney Jay Clayton has asked for a date in early October to retry Tornado Cash's Roman Storm on two charges on which a jury previously failed to reach a decision.

items.title: Wall Street funneled $540M into US Solana ETFs in Q4: Bloomberg
items.summary: Investment advisors were the biggest buyers of the US-based spot Solana ETFs at over $270 million, while hedge fund managers came in next at $186 million.

items.title: Sharplink reports $735M loss in 2025 as Ethereum dived
items.summary: Sharplink says it will continue to acquire Ether despite a brutal crypto market sell-off last year that led to a $616.2 million paper loss on its ETH holdings.

items.title: Oil tumbles, crypto gains as Trump sends mixed signals over Iran war
items.summary: “I think the war is very complete, pretty much,” Donald Trump told reporters before posting on his social media platform later that “Death, Fire, and Fury” will reign upon Iran.
